things.name: Lalbagh Fort
things.description: 17th-century Mughal fortress with three structures including the tomb of Pari Bibi

things.name: Ahsan Manzil (Pink Palace)
things.description: Victorian-era pink palace of the Nawabs of Dhaka, now a museum

things.name: Old Dhaka (Puran Dhaka)
things.description: 18th-century Nawab-era old city with rickshaws, Mughal mosques and street food

things.name: Buriganga River Boat Trip
things.description: Boat journey on the river past the 17th-century Mughal sites of old Dhaka

things.name: Star Mosque (Tara Masjid)
things.description: Extraordinary 18th-century mosque covered in blue and white star-motif Chinese porcelain

things.name: National Museum of Bangladesh
things.description: Bangladesh's largest museum with ancient Hindu and Buddhist sculpture

things.name: Liberation War Museum
things.description: Moving museum dedicated to the 1971 Bangladesh Liberation War and genocide

things.name: Dhaka Zoo
things.description: Large zoo with Bengal tigers, Royal Bengal tigresses and gharial crocodiles

things.name: Sundarbans Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage mangrove forest - the world's largest, home to Bengal tigers

things.name: Kacchi Biryani at Old Dhaka
things.description: Dhaka's legendary mutton biryani slow-cooked in sealed earthenware pots
